summary: Gate 4: Extended emotiond-bridge hook v1.6 with self_report_contract injection

changes: Added buildRawState() function to transform decision to interpreter format
Added callInterpreter() function to call Python interpreter via spawn
Added generateSelfReportContract() function with fallback handling
Extended context.json output with self_report_contract field

test_results.output: Correctly transforms decision.explanation.emotion.all and relationships to raw_state format
Successfully calls Python interpreter and returns contract with allowed_claims and forbidden_claims
Returns structured contract with mode, raw_state, report_policy, metadata
numeric mode adds numeric_state to report_policy and claims include numeric values
context.json contains self_report_contract with all expected fields
